categories.description_en: Cleansing agents that help water mix with oil and dirt
categories.description_zh: 帮助水与油脂和污垢混合的清洁剂

categories.description_en: Ingredients that attract and hold water
categories.description_zh: 吸引并保持水分的成分

categories.description_en: Ingredients that soften and smooth skin
categories.description_zh: 软化和平滑皮肤的成分

categories.description_en: Ingredients that form a barrier to prevent water loss
categories.description_zh: 形成屏障防止水分流失的成分

categories.description_en: Ingredients with proven biological effects on skin
categories.description_zh: 对皮肤有已证实生物效果的成分
防止微生物生长的成分

categories.description_en: Ingredients that protect against UV radiation
categories.description_zh: 防护紫外线辐射的成分

categories.description_en: Ingredients that remove dead skin cells
Ingredients that help oil and water mix together
categories.description_zh: 帮助油和水混合在一起的成分

categories.description_en: Ingredients that increase viscosity of formulations
categories.description_zh: 增加配方粘稠度的成分

categories.description_en: Ingredients that adjust product acidity or alkalinity
categories.description_zh: 调节产品酸碱度的成分

categories.description_en: Plant-derived ingredients with various skin benefits
categories.description_zh: 具有各种皮肤功效的植物来源成分

categories.description_en: Short chains of amino acids that signal skin processes
categories.description_zh: 信号传导促进皮肤修复的短链氨基酸

en: Reducing sebum production and pore appearance
zh: 减少皮脂分泌和毛孔外观

effective_concentration.notes_en: Higher concentrations (>10%) may cause flushing without additional benefit. 5% is optimal for most people.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 较高浓度（>10%）可能导致泛红但不会带来额外效果。5%对大多数人来说是最佳浓度。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Extensively studied with multiple RCTs supporting efficacy for hyperpigmentation, oil control, and barrier repair.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 经过广泛研究，多项随机对照试验支持其对色素沉着、控油和屏障修复的功效。

skin_types.notes_en: Well-tolerated by most skin types including sensitive skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 大多数肤质（包括敏感肌）都能良好耐受。

interactions.details_en: Old myth they cancel out. Modern research shows they can be used together safely.
interactions.details_zh: 旧说法认为两者会相互抵消是误解。现代研究表明可以安全地一起使用。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 孕期使用被认为是安全的。
ingredients.notes_en: One of the most versatile and well-researched skincare actives. Great for beginners.
ingredients.notes_zh: 最多功能且研究充分的护肤活性成分之一。非常适合新手。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Start low and increase gradually. Higher isn't always better.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 从低浓度开始逐渐增加。浓度不是越高越好。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Gold standard anti-aging ingredient with decades of research.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 具有数十年研究历史的抗衰老黄金标准成分。

skin_types.notes_en: Requires careful introduction. Use sunscreen during the day.
skin_types.notes_zh: 需要谨慎引入。白天必须使用防晒霜。

interactions.details_en: Using together can increase irritation. Best to alternate nights.
interactions.details_zh: 同时使用可能增加刺激。最好隔夜交替使用。

interactions.details_en: Can oxidize and deactivate retinol. Use at different times.
interactions.details_zh: 可能氧化并使视黄醇失活。应在不同时间使用。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: AVOID during pregnancy. Use bakuchiol or azelaic acid instead.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 孕期应避免使用。可使用补骨脂酚或壬二酸替代。
ingredients.notes_en: Most proven anti-aging ingredient. Results take 3-6 months. Always use SPF.
ingredients.notes_zh: 最有效的抗衰老成分。需要3-6个月见效。必须配合防晒。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Effective at low concentrations. Multiple molecular weights work best.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 低浓度即有效。多种分子量效果最佳。

skin_types.notes_en: In very dry climates, seal with moisturizer to prevent reverse osmosis.
skin_types.notes_zh: 在非常干燥的环境中，需涂抹保湿霜锁住水分。

ingredients.notes_en: A hydration staple. Sodium Hyaluronate is the salt form with smaller molecules.
ingredients.notes_zh: 保湿必备成分。透明质酸钠是盐形式，分子更小。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Very effective even at low concentrations.

ingredients.notes_en: Gold standard humectant. Often outperforms trendy alternatives in studies.
ingredients.notes_zh: 保湿黄金标准。在研究中通常优于时髦的替代品。

interactions.details_en: Can increase irritation. Alternate use recommended.

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Avoid leave-on products. Wash-off cleansers are lower risk.
ingredients.notes_en: Oil-soluble BHA penetrates pores unlike water-soluble AHAs.
ingredients.notes_zh: 脂溶性BHA能渗透毛孔，不同于水溶性AHA。

effective_concentration.notes_en: pH must be below 3.5 for L-ascorbic acid penetration.

ingredients.notes_en: Unstable—oxidizes with light/air. Look for opaque, airless packaging.
ingredients.notes_zh: 不稳定——接触光/空气会氧化。选择不透光、真空包装。

skin_types.notes_en: Can strip natural oils and compromise barrier with frequent use.

ingredients.notes_en: Not inherently bad but can be harsh. Dry/sensitive skin may prefer amino acid surfactants.
ingredients.notes_zh: 并非本质上不好但可能刺激。干性/敏感肌可能更适合氨基酸表面活性剂。

skin_types.notes_en: One of the most common causes of skin reactions.

ingredients.notes_en: 'Fragrance' can mean 3000+ chemicals. 'Fragrance-free' ≠ 'unscented'.
ingredients.notes_zh: '香精'可代表3000多种化学物质。'无香料'≠'无香味'。

ingredients.notes_en: Common paraben alternative. Preservatives are necessary for product safety.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常见的对羟基苯甲酸酯替代品。防腐剂对产品安全是必要的。

skin_types.notes_en: Non-comedogenic despite myths. Doesn't suffocate skin.

ingredients.notes_en: Silicones are misunderstood. They don't clog pores or prevent absorption.
ingredients.notes_zh: 硅油被误解了。它们不会堵塞毛孔或阻止吸收。

ingredients.notes_en: Already 50% of your skin barrier. Products replenish what's lost.
ingredients.notes_zh: 已经占你皮肤屏障的50%。产品补充流失的部分。

ingredients.notes_en: K-beauty favorite. Look for TECA or specific compounds (madecassoside).
ingredients.notes_zh: 韩国护肤品最爱。选择含TECA或特定化合物（羟基积雪草苷）的产品。

interactions.details_en: Can cause significant irritation together. Alternate.

ingredients.notes_en: Smallest AHA = deepest penetration. MUST use sunscreen.
ingredients.notes_zh: 最小的AHA = 最深的渗透。必须使用防晒霜。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: One of the safest actives during pregnancy.
ingredients.notes_en: Underrated multitasker. Works for acne, rosacea, AND hyperpigmentation.
ingredients.notes_zh: 被低估的多效成分。对痤疮、玫瑰痤疮和色素沉着都有效。

skin_types.notes_en: May leave white cast, especially on darker skin tones.

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Safest sunscreen option during pregnancy (stays on skin surface).
ingredients.notes_en: Broadest spectrum of any single sunscreen ingredient. Gentle for sensitive skin.
ingredients.notes_zh: 单一防晒成分中最广谱的。对敏感肌温和。

effective_concentration.notes_en: 2.5% often as effective as 10% with less irritation.

interactions.details_en: Can oxidize retinol. Use at different times of day.

ingredients.notes_en: Very effective but drying. Will bleach fabrics. Start with 2.5%.
ingredients.notes_zh: 非常有效但干燥。会漂白织物。从2.5%开始。

skin_types.notes_en: One of the few oils suitable for oily skin.

ingredients.vegan_notes_en: Modern squalane is from olives/sugarcane, not sharks.
ingredients.notes_en: Found naturally in human sebum. Absorbs quickly without greasiness.
ingredients.notes_zh: 天然存在于人体皮脂中。吸收快，不油腻。

ingredients.notes_en: Known for wound healing. Very well-tolerated.
ingredients.notes_zh: 以伤口愈合闻名。耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Gentler, safer alternative to hydroquinone. Results take 8-12 weeks.
ingredients.notes_zh: 比对苯二酚更温和、更安全的替代品。8-12周见效。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR and EU SCCS confirm safe at permitted levels (0.4% individual, 0.8% total parabens).
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR和欧盟SCCS确认在允许浓度下安全（单一0.4%，总量0.8%）。

skin_types.notes_en: Generally well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 通常耐受性良好。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 化妆品浓度下被认为是安全的。
ingredients.notes_en: Most studied preservative. Controversial but supported as safe by regulatory bodies.
ingredients.notes_zh: 研究最多的防腐剂。虽有争议但各监管机构认定安全。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Safe at up to 0.14% per EU SCCS 2013 opinion. Often paired with methylparaben.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 根据欧盟SCCS 2013意见，0.14%以下安全。常与对羟基苯甲酸甲酯搭配。

skin_types.notes_en: Low irritation potential.
skin_types.notes_zh: 低刺激可能性。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 化妆品浓度下被认为是安全的。
ingredients.notes_en: Often used with methylparaben for broader preservation.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常与对羟基苯甲酸甲酯配合使用以获得更广的防腐效果。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Banned in EU leave-on products since 2016 due to sensitization risk. Allowed in rinse-off at ≤15ppm.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 2016年起在欧盟驻留产品中被禁用，因有致敏风险。冲洗型产品中允许≤15ppm。

skin_types.notes_en: High allergen risk. One of the most common contact allergens.
skin_types.notes_zh: 高致敏风险。最常见的接触性过敏原之一。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: No specific pregnancy concerns, but high sensitization risk for everyone.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 无特定孕期问题，但对所有人有高致敏风险。
ingredients.notes_en: Avoid in leave-on products. Named Allergen of the Year 2013 by ACDS.
ingredients.notes_zh: 避免在驻留产品中使用。2013年被美国接触性皮炎学会评为年度过敏原。

en: Prevents yeast, bacteria, and mold growth
zh: 防止酵母、细菌和霉菌生长

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Safe up to 2.5% per CIR. Most effective below pH 5.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR确认2.5%以下安全。pH低于5时最有效。

skin_types.notes_en: Generally well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 通常耐受性良好。

interactions.details_en: Can form trace benzene when combined with Vitamin C and exposed to heat/light. Modern formulations minimize this.
interactions.details_zh: 与维生素C结合在高温/光照下可能形成微量苯。现代配方已最小化此风险。

ingredients.notes_en: Popular paraben alternative. Often paired with potassium sorbate.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常见的对羟基苯甲酸酯替代品。常与山梨酸钾配合使用。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR assessed safe. Works best at pH below 6.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估安全。pH低于6时效果最佳。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Popular in 'clean beauty' formulations. Often paired with sodium benzoate.
ingredients.notes_zh: 在'纯净美容'配方中很受欢迎。常与苯甲酸钠配合。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Enhances efficacy of phenoxyethanol. CIR assessed safe.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 增强苯氧乙醇的效力。CIR评估安全。

skin_types.notes_en: Generally well-tolerated but may sting on broken skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 通常耐受性好但可能刺激受损皮肤。

ingredients.notes_en: Commonly paired with phenoxyethanol as a paraben-free preservation system.
ingredients.notes_zh: 非常常见地与苯氧乙醇搭配作为无对羟基苯甲酸酯的防腐系统。

zh: 无视黄醇类副作用的抗衰老

effective_concentration.notes_en: Can be used AM and PM. No photosensitivity.

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: 2019 British Journal of Dermatology study showed comparable results to 0.5% retinol for wrinkles and pigmentation.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 2019年英国皮肤病学杂志研究显示，其对皱纹和色素沉着的效果与0.5%视黄醇相当。

skin_types.notes_en: Excellent retinol alternative for sensitive skin and pregnancy.
skin_types.notes_zh: 敏感肌和孕期的优秀视黄醇替代品。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 植物来源，孕期被认为安全。
ingredients.notes_en: Best retinol alternative. Gentler with no purging period. Can be combined with retinol for enhanced results.
ingredients.notes_zh: 最佳视黄醇替代品。更温和无爆痘期。可与视黄醇联用增强效果。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Effective at relatively low concentrations.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 在较低浓度下即可有效。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Multiple clinical trials show efficacy for melasma and PIH. Originally used orally for melasma in Asia.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 多项临床试验证明对黄褐斑和炎症后色素沉着有效。最初在亚洲口服治疗黄褐斑。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated. Good for all skin types.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。适合所有肤质。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Insufficient data for topical use in pregnancy. Consult dermatologist.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 孕期外用数据不足。请咨询皮肤科医生。
ingredients.notes_en: Rising star for hyperpigmentation. Very popular in Asian skincare. Works well with niacinamide and vitamin C.
ingredients.notes_zh: 美白淡斑新星。在亚洲护肤中非常受欢迎。与烟酰胺和维C搭配效果好。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Unstable—often formulated as kojic dipalmitate for better stability.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 不稳定——常配制为曲酸双棕榈酸酯以提高稳定性。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Good evidence for tyrosinase inhibition. Less stable than alternatives.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 对酪氨酸酶抑制有良好证据。稳定性不如替代品。

skin_types.notes_en: Can cause contact dermatitis in some individuals.
skin_types.notes_zh: 某些人可能出现接触性皮炎。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Topical use generally considered safe in pregnancy.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 外用在孕期一般被认为安全。
ingredients.notes_en: Derived from fungi. Effective brightener but less stable than arbutin or tranexamic acid.
ingredients.notes_zh: 来源于真菌。有效的美白成分但稳定性不如熊果苷或传明酸。

effective_concentration.notes_en: 0.1% is OTC in many countries. 0.3% requires prescription.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 0.1%在很多国家为非处方药。0.3%需要处方。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: FDA-approved for acne. More stable and less irritating than tretinoin.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: FDA批准用于痤疮。比维A酸更稳定且刺激性更低。

skin_types.notes_en: Less irritating than tretinoin but still requires gradual introduction.
skin_types.notes_zh: 比维A酸刺激性小但仍需逐渐引入。

interactions.details_en: Effective combination for acne (Epiduo). Can be used together.
interactions.details_zh: 治疗痤疮的有效组合（Epiduo）。可以同时使用。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 视黄醇类——孕期避免使用。
ingredients.notes_en: Most well-tolerated retinoid for acne. Available OTC as Differin in US/Canada/AU.
ingredients.notes_zh: 痤疮治疗中耐受性最好的视黄醇类。在美国/加拿大/澳大利亚以Differin为OTC产品。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Effective at very low concentrations.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 在极低浓度下即可有效。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: In vitro studies show collagen stimulation. Clinical studies suggest wrinkle reduction.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 体外研究显示刺激胶原蛋白。临床研究提示可减少皱纹。

skin_types.notes_en: Extremely well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性极好。

ingredients.notes_en: One of the most studied peptides in skincare. Gentle alternative to retinol for anti-aging.
ingredients.notes_zh: 护肤中研究最多的多肽之一。抗衰老方面是视黄醇的温和替代品。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Often used with Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7 as Matrixyl 3000.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 常与棕榈酰四肽-7组合为Matrixyl 3000。

skin_types.notes_en: Non-irritating.
skin_types.notes_zh: 无刺激性。

ingredients.notes_en: Key component of Matrixyl 3000 when paired with Palmitoyl Tetrapeptide-7.
ingredients.notes_zh: 与棕榈酰四肽-7配合时为Matrixyl 3000的关键成分。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Demonstrated wound healing and anti-aging benefits in multiple studies.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 多项研究证明具有促进愈合和抗衰老功效。

skin_types.notes_en: Well-tolerated at standard concentrations.
skin_types.notes_zh: 标准浓度下耐受性好。

interactions.details_en: L-ascorbic acid may reduce copper peptide efficacy. Use at different times.
interactions.details_zh: 左旋维C可能降低铜肽效力。应在不同时间使用。

interactions.details_en: Low pH products may destabilize copper peptides.
interactions.details_zh: 低pH产品可能使铜肽不稳定。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Limited data but generally considered safe topically.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 数据有限但外用一般被认为安全。
ingredients.notes_en: Distinctive blue color. Don't use with strong acids or vitamin C. Best alone or with gentle products.
ingredients.notes_zh: 独特的蓝色。不要与强酸或维C同用。最好单独使用或与温和产品搭配。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Percentage refers to the solution (typically 0.005% active peptide).
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 百分比指溶液浓度（通常含0.005%活性肽）。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Some studies show modest wrinkle reduction. Often called 'topical Botox' but effect is much milder.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 部分研究显示适度减少皱纹。常被称为'外用肉毒素'但效果温和得多。

skin_types.notes_en: Very gentle.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常温和。

ingredients.notes_en: Marketed as 'Botox in a bottle' but evidence is modest. Gentle, no downside to trying.
ingredients.notes_zh: 被宣传为'瓶中肉毒素'但证据有限。温和无副作用，可以尝试。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Gentler than glycolic. Good entry-level AHA.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 比乙醇酸更温和。适合入门AHA。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Well-established AHA with humectant properties.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 功效确切的AHA，同时具有保湿特性。

skin_types.notes_en: Gentlest AHA, good for dry/sensitive skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 最温和的AHA，适合干性/敏感肌肤。

interactions.details_en: Using together increases irritation risk. Alternate nights.
interactions.details_zh: 同时使用增加刺激风险。建议隔夜交替。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 低浓度（10%以下）通常被认为安全。
ingredients.notes_en: Best AHA for sensitive/dry skin due to humectant properties. Always use SPF.
ingredients.notes_zh: 因其保湿特性，是敏感/干性皮肤的最佳AHA。必须使用防晒。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Larger molecular size means slower penetration and less irritation.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 较大的分子量意味着渗透更慢、刺激更小。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Studies support use for acne, melasma, and photoaging, especially in darker skin tones.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 研究支持用于痤疮、黄褐斑和光老化，尤其适合深肤色。

skin_types.notes_en: Gentlest AHA due to large molecular weight.
skin_types.notes_zh: 因分子量大而成为最温和的AHA。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Generally considered safe at low concentrations.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 低浓度一般被认为安全。
ingredients.notes_en: Best AHA for beginners and those with darker skin tones (lower PIH risk). Always use SPF.
ingredients.notes_zh: 初学者和深肤色的最佳AHA（炎症后色素沉着风险低）。必须使用防晒。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Comparable exfoliation to AHAs with less irritation. Good for sensitive skin.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 与AHA相当的去角质效果但刺激更少。适合敏感肌。

skin_types.notes_en: One of the gentlest chemical exfoliants available.
skin_types.notes_zh: 现有最温和的化学去角质剂之一。

ingredients.notes_en: Best exfoliant for very sensitive skin, eczema, and rosacea. Does not increase sun sensitivity as much as AHAs.
ingredients.notes_zh: 极度敏感肌、湿疹和玫瑰痤疮的最佳去角质剂。不像AHA那样增加光敏性。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Long safety record. CIR assessed as safe.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 使用安全记录悠久。CIR评估安全。

skin_types.notes_en: Generally non-irritating.
skin_types.notes_zh: 通常无刺激性。

ingredients.notes_en: Common emulsifier used to blend oil and water phases.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常见的乳化剂，用于混合油相和水相。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Sugar-based emulsifier with good tolerability.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 基于糖类的乳化剂，耐受性好。

skin_types.notes_en: One of the gentlest emulsifiers.
skin_types.notes_zh: 最温和的乳化剂之一。

ingredients.notes_en: Popular in natural/sensitive skin formulations. Often paired with cetearyl alcohol.
ingredients.notes_zh: 在天然/敏感肌配方中很受欢迎。常与鲸蜡硬脂醇搭配。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR safe. One of the mildest surfactants available.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估安全。现有最温和的表面活性剂之一。

skin_types.notes_en: Very gentle. Preferred for sensitive skin cleansers.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常温和。敏感肌洁面的首选。

ingredients.notes_en: Derived from coconut oil. Excellent gentle surfactant for all skin types.
ingredients.notes_zh: 来源于椰子油。适合所有肤质的优秀温和表面活性剂。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Known as one of the mildest synthetic surfactants.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 被认为是最温和的合成表面活性剂之一。

skin_types.notes_en: Extremely mild. Common in baby products.
skin_types.notes_zh: 极其温和。常用于婴儿产品。

ingredients.notes_en: Found in Dove Beauty Bar. Excellent for those who find SLS too harsh.
ingredients.notes_zh: 用于多芬美容皂。适合觉得SLS太刺激的人。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR safe. Milder than SLS due to ethoxylation.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估安全。因乙氧基化比SLS更温和。

skin_types.notes_en: Milder than SLS but may still irritate very sensitive skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 比SLS温和但仍可能刺激非常敏感的皮肤。

ingredients.notes_en: Milder cousin of SLS. Most common surfactant in personal care.
ingredients.notes_zh: SLS的温和亲戚。个人护理中最常见的表面活性剂。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Considered one of the mildest surfactants. Sugar-based.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 被认为是最温和的表面活性剂之一。糖基。

skin_types.notes_en: Extremely gentle. Popular in natural formulations.
skin_types.notes_zh: 极其温和。在天然配方中很受欢迎。

ingredients.notes_en: Derived from coconut and corn. Excellent for natural and baby formulations.
ingredients.notes_zh: 来源于椰子和玉米。适合天然和婴儿配方。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Very common, well-studied ingredient. CIR safe.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 非常常见、研究充分的成分。CIR评估安全。

skin_types.notes_en: Extremely common. Well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 极其常见。耐受性好。

ingredients.notes_en: One of the most common cosmetic ingredients. Helps other ingredients absorb better.
ingredients.notes_zh: 最常见的化妆品成分之一。帮助其他成分更好地吸收。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Bio-based alternative to petroleum-derived glycols.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 石油来源乙二醇的生物基替代品。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Corn-derived. Popular in 'clean beauty' as a natural humectant.
ingredients.notes_zh: 玉米来源。在'纯净美容'中作为天然保湿剂很受欢迎。

zh: 高浓度下具有角质溶解作用

effective_concentration.notes_en: 2-10% moisturizing. 10-30% keratolytic. 40%+ nail conditions.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 2-10%保湿。10-30%角质溶解。40%以上用于指甲问题。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Extensively studied. Naturally present in skin as part of NMF.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 研究广泛。作为天然保湿因子(NMF)的一部分天然存在于皮肤中。

skin_types.notes_en: Excellent for very dry skin. May sting on broken skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常适合极干性皮肤。可能刺激受损皮肤。

ingredients.notes_en: Dermatologist favorite for very dry skin. Part of skin's natural moisturizing system.
ingredients.notes_zh: 皮肤科医生推荐给极干性皮肤。是皮肤天然保湿系统的一部分。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Component of skin's NMF. Good humectant properties.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 皮肤天然保湿因子的成分。良好的保湿特性。

skin_types.notes_en: Well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性好。

ingredients.notes_en: Naturally found in skin. More hygroscopic than glycerin.
ingredients.notes_zh: 天然存在于皮肤中。比甘油吸湿性更强。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR safe. Long history of use.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估安全。使用历史悠久。

skin_types.notes_en: Fatty alcohol—not drying like simple alcohols (ethanol).
skin_types.notes_zh: 脂肪醇——不像简单醇类（乙醇）那样干燥。

ingredients.notes_en: Don't confuse with drying alcohols. This is a fatty alcohol that softens and conditions.
ingredients.notes_zh: 不要与干燥性醇类混淆。这是一种软化和调理皮肤的脂肪醇。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Contains lupeol cinnamate with anti-inflammatory properties.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 含有具有消炎特性的羽扇豆醇肉桂酸酯。

skin_types.notes_en: May be too heavy for oily/acne-prone skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 对油性/痤疮易发皮肤可能太厚重。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Safe. Good for preventing stretch marks.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 安全。有助于预防妊娠纹。
ingredients.notes_en: Surprisingly low comedogenic rating despite rich texture. Great for body care.
ingredients.notes_zh: 尽管质地丰润但致粉刺指数出奇地低。非常适合身体护理。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Technically a wax ester, not an oil. Very similar to skin's own sebum.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 严格来说是蜡酯而非油。与皮肤自身皮脂非常相似。

skin_types.notes_en: One of the few oils suitable for oily skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 少数适合油性皮肤的油之一。

ingredients.notes_en: Can actually help regulate oil production in oily skin. Wax ester structure closest to human sebum.
ingredients.notes_zh: 实际上可以帮助调节油性皮肤的油脂分泌。蜡酯结构最接近人类皮脂。

en: Rich in vitamins A and C

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Some clinical evidence for scar improvement and skin aging. Rich in essential fatty acids.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 部分临床证据支持改善疤痕和皮肤老化。富含必需脂肪酸。

skin_types.notes_en: May be too heavy for oily skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 对油性皮肤可能太厚重。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Safe. Contains natural retinoids but in negligible amounts.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 安全。含天然视黄醇类但含量可忽略。
ingredients.notes_en: Contains natural trans-retinoic acid in trace amounts. Popular for post-acne scarring.
ingredients.notes_zh: 含微量天然反式视黄酸。用于痘疤修复很受欢迎。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Reduces TEWL by 98%. Gold standard occlusive per dermatological research.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 减少98%的经皮水分流失。皮肤科研究中的黄金标准封闭剂。

skin_types.notes_en: Non-comedogenic despite heavy feel. May feel greasy.
skin_types.notes_zh: 尽管质感厚重但不致粉刺。可能感觉油腻。

ingredients.notes_en: Dermatologist favorite. Non-comedogenic despite myths. Best applied over damp skin.
ingredients.notes_zh: 皮肤科医生的最爱。虽然有误解但不致粉刺。最好涂在湿润的皮肤上。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Cosmetic-grade mineral oil is highly purified and non-comedogenic per CIR.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 化妆品级矿物油经高度纯化，CIR评估不致粉刺。

skin_types.notes_en: Cosmetic-grade is safe and non-comedogenic despite negative perception.
skin_types.notes_zh: 化妆品级安全且不致粉刺，尽管存在负面认知。

ingredients.notes_en: Unfairly maligned. Cosmetic-grade is one of the most inert, non-allergenic ingredients.
ingredients.notes_zh: 被不公正地诋毁。化妆品级是最惰性、最不致敏的成分之一。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: FDA Category I sunscreen agent. Best for UVB; combine with ZnO for broad spectrum.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: FDA第一类防晒剂。UVB防护最佳；与氧化锌组合获得广谱防护。

skin_types.notes_en: Very gentle mineral filter. May leave white cast on darker skin.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常温和的矿物过滤剂。在深肤色上可能留白。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Safe. Preferred during pregnancy as a physical filter.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 安全。作为物理过滤剂在孕期更受推荐。
ingredients.notes_en: Often used with zinc oxide for full spectrum coverage. Nano forms reduce white cast.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常与氧化锌组合获得全光谱防护。纳米形式可减少泛白。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: FDA-approved. Best chemical UVA filter available in US market.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: FDA批准。美国市场上最好的化学UVA过滤剂。

skin_types.notes_en: Can be irritating for some. Degrades in sunlight without stabilization.
skin_types.notes_zh: 对部分人可能有刺激。未经稳定化处理时会在阳光下降解。

interactions.ingredient_zh: 甲氧基肉桂酸乙基己酯
interactions.details_en: Can destabilize avobenzone. Needs proper formulation.
interactions.details_zh: 可能使阿伏苯宗不稳定。需要合理配方。

interactions.details_en: Octocrylene stabilizes avobenzone. Common combination.
interactions.details_zh: 奥克立林稳定阿伏苯宗。常见组合。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: FDA approved. Some prefer mineral filters during pregnancy but avobenzone is considered safe.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: FDA批准。部分人孕期偏好矿物过滤剂但阿伏苯宗被认为安全。
ingredients.notes_en: Best UVA protection in US sunscreens. Needs to be stabilized (with octocrylene or mexoryl).
ingredients.notes_zh: 美国防晒产品中最好的UVA防护。需要被稳定化（用奥克立林或麦色滤）。

ingredients.chinese_name: 甲氧基肉桂酸乙基己酯
ingredients.evidence_notes_en: FDA approved. Banned in Hawaii and Palau for coral reef concerns.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: FDA批准。因珊瑚礁问题在夏威夷和帕劳被禁止。

skin_types.notes_en: Some concern about endocrine disruption at very high exposure.
skin_types.notes_zh: 在极高暴露下有内分泌干扰的担忧。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Potential endocrine disruptor. Many dermatologists recommend avoiding during pregnancy.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 潜在内分泌干扰物。许多皮肤科医生建议孕期避免。
ingredients.notes_en: Effective UVB filter but environmental and hormonal concerns have reduced popularity.
ingredients.notes_zh: 有效的UVB过滤剂但环境和激素方面的担忧降低了其受欢迎程度。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: EU SCCS recommends max 10% (down from 15%). Under further review.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 欧盟SCCS建议最高10%（从15%下调）。仍在进一步审查中。

skin_types.notes_en: Under regulatory scrutiny.
skin_types.notes_zh: 正在受到监管审查。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Some endocrine disruption concerns. Consider mineral alternatives during pregnancy.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 有内分泌干扰方面的担忧。孕期建议考虑矿物替代品。
ingredients.notes_en: Commonly used but under increasing scrutiny for potential hormonal effects.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常用但因潜在激素影响受到越来越多的审查。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Well-established antioxidant. Synergistic with Vitamin C.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 功效确切的抗氧化剂。与维生素C有协同作用。

skin_types.notes_en: Some people with acne-prone skin find pure tocopherol breaks them out.
skin_types.notes_zh: 部分痤疮易发皮肤的人发现纯生育酚可能导致爆痘。

interactions.details_en: Vitamin E regenerates oxidized Vitamin C. Powerful combination.
interactions.details_zh: 维生素E能再生被氧化的维生素C。强效组合。

ingredients.notes_en: Almost ubiquitous in skincare. Stabilizes vitamin C formulas. Look for d-alpha tocopherol (natural form).
ingredients.notes_zh: 几乎所有护肤品中都有。稳定维C配方。寻找d-α-生育酚（天然形式）。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Strong in vitro data. Clinical topical studies still emerging.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 体外数据充分。外用临床研究仍在发展中。

skin_types.notes_en: Well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性好。

ingredients.notes_en: Found in grape skins and red wine. Unstable—needs good packaging.
ingredients.notes_zh: 存在于葡萄皮和红酒中。不稳定——需要良好的包装。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Landmark Duke University study (2005) showed doubling of Vit C+E photoprotection when ferulic acid added.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 杜克大学2005年里程碑研究显示加入阿魏酸后维C+E的光防护效果翻倍。

skin_types.notes_en: Well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性好。

interactions.details_en: C+E+Ferulic is the gold standard antioxidant combination.
interactions.details_zh: 维C+维E+阿魏酸是黄金标准抗氧化组合。

interactions.details_en: Works synergistically. The famous CE Ferulic combination.
interactions.details_zh: 协同作用。著名的CE Ferulic组合。

ingredients.notes_en: Essential companion to Vitamin C serums. The SkinCeuticals CE Ferulic set the standard.
ingredients.notes_zh: 维C精华的必备搭档。修丽可CE Ferulic树立了标准。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: EGCG is well-studied. Topical efficacy depends on formulation stability.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: EGCG研究充分。外用效果取决于配方稳定性。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Rich in polyphenols (EGCG). Look for products with opaque packaging as green tea oxidizes.
ingredients.notes_zh: 富含多酚(EGCG)。选择不透明包装的产品，因为绿茶会氧化。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Glabridin inhibits tyrosinase. Good evidence for brightening and soothing.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 光甘草定抑制酪氨酸酶。美白和舒缓方面有良好证据。

skin_types.notes_en: Very gentle brightener.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常温和的美白成分。

ingredients.notes_en: Excellent gentle brightener. Popular in K-beauty and J-beauty.
ingredients.notes_zh: 优秀的温和美白成分。在韩国和日本护肤中很受欢迎。

effective_concentration.notes_en: 5% tea tree oil comparable to 5% benzoyl peroxide for acne (slower onset, less irritation).
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 5%茶树油对痤疮的效果与5%过氧化苯甲酰相当（起效较慢但刺激更小）。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Clinical trials show efficacy against mild-moderate acne.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 临床试验显示对轻中度痤疮有效。

skin_types.notes_en: Can be irritating if used undiluted. Always dilute.
skin_types.notes_zh: 未稀释使用可能刺激。务必稀释使用。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Topical use in diluted form considered safe.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 稀释后外用被认为安全。
ingredients.notes_en: Natural acne fighter. Never apply undiluted. Can cause contact dermatitis in sensitive individuals.
ingredients.notes_zh: 天然抗痘成分。切勿原液使用。敏感个体可能出现接触性皮炎。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Contains bisabolol and chamazulene with anti-inflammatory properties.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 含有具有消炎特性的没药醇和甘菊环烃。

skin_types.notes_en: Avoid if allergic to plants in the Asteraceae family.
skin_types.notes_zh: 如果对菊科植物过敏则应避免。

ingredients.notes_en: Classic soothing ingredient. Note: people with ragweed allergies may react to chamomile.
ingredients.notes_zh: 经典舒缓成分。注意：对豚草过敏的人可能对洋甘菊有反应。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Well-established for burns and wound healing. Contains acemannan.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 用于烧伤和伤口愈合已有充分验证。含乙酰甘露聚糖。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Classic soothing ingredient. Often the base of gel products.
ingredients.notes_zh: 经典舒缓成分。常作为凝胶产品的基底。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Contains ferulic acid and phytic acid. Traditional Asian skincare ingredient.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 含阿魏酸和植酸。传统亚洲护肤成分。

skin_types.notes_en: Very gentle.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常温和。

ingredients.notes_en: Staple in Japanese skincare (sake lees). Contains natural brightening compounds.
ingredients.notes_zh: 日本护肤中的主力成分（酒粕）。含天然美白化合物。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Long history of use. Recognized as a skin protectant by FDA.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 使用历史悠久。被FDA认定为皮肤保护剂。

skin_types.notes_en: One of the gentlest active ingredients.
skin_types.notes_zh: 最温和的活性成分之一。

ingredients.notes_en: Found in comfrey plant. Excellent in post-procedure and sensitive skin products.
ingredients.notes_zh: 存在于紫草植物中。非常适合术后和敏感肌产品。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Can be drying and irritating in high concentrations. Disrupts barrier with prolonged use.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 高浓度可能导致干燥和刺激。长期使用可损害屏障功能。

skin_types.notes_en: Avoid if dry, sensitive, or barrier-compromised.
skin_types.notes_zh: 干性、敏感或屏障受损的皮肤应避免。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Topical use safe but may be drying.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 外用安全但可能导致干燥。
ingredients.notes_en: Controversial. High on ingredient list = potentially drying. Small amounts as solvent are fine. Different from fatty alcohols.
ingredients.notes_zh: 有争议。在成分表中排名靠前=可能导致干燥。少量作为溶剂没问题。与脂肪醇不同。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Universal solvent. Almost always first ingredient in water-based products.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 通用溶剂。在水基产品中几乎总是排在第一位。

skin_types.notes_en: Universal.
skin_types.notes_zh: 通用。

ingredients.notes_en: If it's first on the list, the product is water-based. Anhydrous products don't contain it.
ingredients.notes_zh: 如果排在成分表第一位说明产品是水基的。无水产品不含水。

effective_concentration.notes_en: OTC 2% in many countries. 4% requires prescription. Use max 3-5 months then break.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 许多国家OTC浓度为2%。4%需处方。最多使用3-5个月后需休息。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Gold standard for hyperpigmentation treatment. Must be used under medical supervision.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 色素沉着治疗的黄金标准。需在医学监督下使用。

skin_types.notes_en: Can cause ochronosis with prolonged use. Must use sunscreen.
skin_types.notes_zh: 长期使用可能导致褐黄病。必须使用防晒。

interactions.details_en: Can temporarily stain skin dark. Avoid using simultaneously.
interactions.details_zh: 可能暂时使皮肤变色。避免同时使用。

interactions.details_en: Retinoids enhance hydroquinone efficacy. Common in Kligman formula.
interactions.details_zh: 视黄醇类增强对苯二酚效果。常见于三合一配方。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Avoid during pregnancy. Significant systemic absorption.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 孕期避免。有显著的系统性吸收。
ingredients.notes_en: Most effective brightening agent but requires medical guidance. Banned OTC in some countries. Cycle on/off.
ingredients.notes_zh: 最有效的美白剂但需要医学指导。在某些国家OTC被禁。需要间歇性使用。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Prescription only. Start low, increase gradually.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 仅限处方。从低浓度开始逐渐增加。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Most studied retinoid with decades of research. FDA approved for acne and photoaging.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 研究最多的维甲酸，数十年研究历史。FDA批准用于痤疮和光老化。

skin_types.notes_en: Significant adjustment period. Peeling, redness, dryness common initially.
skin_types.notes_zh: 需要显著的适应期。初期常见脱皮、泛红、干燥。

interactions.details_en: Increased irritation risk. Introduce slowly.
interactions.details_zh: 增加刺激风险。缓慢引入。

interactions.details_en: Can degrade tretinoin. Use at different times.
interactions.details_zh: 可能降解维A酸。应在不同时间使用。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: STRICTLY AVOID during pregnancy. Known teratogen.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 孕期严格避免。已知致畸剂。
ingredients.notes_en: Prescription-strength retinoid. The gold standard for anti-aging. Requires sunscreen.
ingredients.notes_zh: 处方级维甲酸。抗衰老的黄金标准。必须配合防晒。

effective_concentration.notes_en: Stronger than retinol, gentler than tretinoin.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: 比视黄醇强，比维A酸温和。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: One conversion step from retinoic acid. Also has direct antibacterial activity.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 距视黄酸仅一步转化。还具有直接抗菌活性。

skin_types.notes_en: Better tolerated than tretinoin but stronger than retinol.
skin_types.notes_zh: 比维A酸耐受性好但比视黄醇强。

interactions.details_en: May increase irritation. Alternate use.
interactions.details_zh: 可能增加刺激。交替使用。

ingredients.notes_en: The 'middle ground' retinoid. More effective than retinol, better tolerated than tretinoin.
ingredients.notes_zh: '中间地带'的维甲酸类。比视黄醇更有效，比维A酸更耐受。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Weakest retinoid. Needs multiple conversions to become retinoic acid.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 最弱的维甲酸类。需要多次转化才能成为视黄酸。

skin_types.notes_en: Very gentle but also less effective.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常温和但效果也较弱。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Still a retinoid—avoid during pregnancy as a precaution.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 仍属维甲酸类——作为预防措施孕期应避免。
ingredients.notes_en: Often a marketing ingredient. Very mild—good for absolute beginners only.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常在产品中作为宣传成分。非常温和——仅适合完全的新手。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: More stable than L-ascorbic acid. Good penetration.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 比左旋维C更稳定。渗透性好。

skin_types.notes_en: Better tolerated than L-ascorbic acid.
skin_types.notes_zh: 比左旋维C耐受性更好。

ingredients.notes_en: Good option for those who find L-ascorbic acid too irritating.
ingredients.notes_zh: 对觉得左旋维C太刺激的人来说是好选择。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Very stable. Converted to ascorbic acid by enzymes in skin.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 非常稳定。在皮肤中由酶转化为抗坏血酸。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Good water-soluble Vitamin C derivative. Gentler but slower-acting than L-ascorbic acid.
ingredients.notes_zh: 良好的水溶性维C衍生物。比左旋维C温和但起效较慢。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Studies show 5% SAP effective against acne. Good stability at neutral pH.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 研究显示5%SAP对痤疮有效。在中性pH下稳定性好。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated. Works at neutral pH.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。在中性pH下起效。

ingredients.notes_en: Works at skin-friendly pH 6-7 unlike L-ascorbic acid (pH <3.5). Also has anti-acne properties.
ingredients.notes_zh: 在皮肤友好的pH 6-7下起效，不像左旋维C需要pH<3.5。还有抗痤疮特性。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Well-studied anti-inflammatory. Originally from chamomile, now often synthetic.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 研究充分的消炎成分。最初来源于洋甘菊，现在通常为合成。

skin_types.notes_en: One of the gentlest anti-inflammatories.
skin_types.notes_zh: 最温和的消炎成分之一。

ingredients.notes_en: Derived from chamomile or synthesized. Excellent for calming irritated skin.
ingredients.notes_zh: 来源于洋甘菊或合成。用于镇静受刺激的皮肤效果极佳。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Key active triterpenoid from Centella Asiatica. Well-studied for wound healing.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 积雪草中的关键活性三萜类化合物。在伤口愈合方面研究充分。

skin_types.notes_en: Extremely gentle.
skin_types.notes_zh: 极其温和。

ingredients.notes_en: One of four key actives in Centella Asiatica (with asiaticoside, asiatic acid, madecassic acid).
ingredients.notes_zh: 积雪草四种关键活性成分之一（另有积雪草苷、积雪草酸、羟基积雪草酸）。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Contains glycoproteins, hyaluronic acid, glycolic acid. Limited clinical studies but popular anecdotally.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 含糖蛋白、透明质酸、乙醇酸。临床研究有限但经验上很受欢迎。

skin_types.notes_en: Well-tolerated. Very popular in K-beauty.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性好。在韩国护肤中非常受欢迎。

ingredients.notes_en: K-beauty staple (COSRX, Missha). Not vegan. Contains a natural mix of beneficial compounds.
ingredients.notes_zh: 韩国护肤品的代表成分（COSRX、谜尚）。非素食。含天然有益化合物混合物。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Rich in flavonoids. Studies show antimicrobial and wound healing properties.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 富含类黄酮。研究显示抗菌和促进愈合特性。

skin_types.notes_en: Avoid if allergic to bee products.
skin_types.notes_zh: 对蜂产品过敏者应避免。

ingredients.notes_en: Popular in K-beauty for acne-prone skin. Not vegan. Bee allergy is a contraindication.
ingredients.notes_zh: 在韩国护肤中用于痤疮易发肌肤很受欢迎。非素食。蜂产品过敏为禁忌。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Traditional herbal medicine ingredient. Contains flavonoids and tannins.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 传统中草药成分。含类黄酮和单宁。

skin_types.notes_en: Very soothing. Avoid if allergic to Asteraceae family.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非常舒缓。对菊科植物过敏者应避免。

ingredients.notes_en: Trending K-beauty ingredient. Known in traditional Chinese and Korean medicine.
ingredients.notes_zh: 韩国护肤热门成分。在中韩传统医学中有悠久历史。

ingredients.chinese_name: 半乳糖酵母样菌发酵产物滤液
ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Proprietary ingredient of SK-II. Contains vitamins, amino acids, minerals. Limited independent studies.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: SK-II的专有成分。含维生素、氨基酸、矿物质。独立研究有限。

skin_types.notes_en: Well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性好。

ingredients.notes_en: Made famous by SK-II Facial Treatment Essence. Fermented yeast filtrate. Popular in J-beauty.
ingredients.notes_zh: 因SK-II神仙水而闻名。酵母发酵滤液。在日本护肤中很受欢迎。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Similar to Galactomyces but different yeast strain. Rich in B vitamins and amino acids.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 类似半乳糖酵母样菌但酵母菌株不同。富含B族维生素和氨基酸。

skin_types.notes_en: May exacerbate fungal acne in some individuals.
skin_types.notes_zh: 在某些人中可能加重真菌性痤疮。

ingredients.notes_en: Avoid if you have fungal acne (Malassezia-related). Otherwise a good hydrating active.
ingredients.notes_zh: 如有真菌性痤疮（马拉色菌相关）应避免。否则是很好的保湿活性成分。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Effective oil absorber. Common in clay masks.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 有效的吸油剂。常见于泥膜中。

skin_types.notes_en: Can be drying. Best for oily skin or occasional use.
skin_types.notes_zh: 可能导致干燥。最适合油性皮肤或偶尔使用。

ingredients.notes_en: Aztec Secret is 100% bentonite. Mix with ACV for a popular DIY mask. Don't overuse.
ingredients.notes_zh: Aztec Secret是100%膨润土。与苹果醋混合制作热门DIY面膜。不要过度使用。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Gentler than bentonite. Suitable for sensitive skin masks.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 比膨润土温和。适合敏感肌面膜。

skin_types.notes_en: Gentler clay option.
skin_types.notes_zh: 更温和的泥类选择。

ingredients.notes_en: Gentler alternative to bentonite. Good for sensitive skin that still wants oil control.
ingredients.notes_zh: 膨润土的温和替代品。适合仍需控油的敏感肌。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Widely used, long safety record. CIR safe.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 广泛使用，安全记录悠久。CIR评估安全。

skin_types.notes_en: Non-active. Purely functional.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非活性成分。纯粹功能性。

ingredients.notes_en: Purely a texture ingredient. Helps products feel smooth and spread well.
ingredients.notes_zh: 纯粹的质地成分。帮助产品更顺滑、更好延展。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Very common in gel formulations. CIR safe.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 在凝胶配方中非常常见。CIR评估安全。

skin_types.notes_en: Non-active. Purely functional.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非活性成分。纯粹功能性。

ingredients.notes_en: Creates the gel texture in many products. Needs to be neutralized to thicken properly.
ingredients.notes_zh: 在许多产品中形成凝胶质地。需要中和才能正确增稠。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Universal pH adjuster. AHA properties only at higher concentrations.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 通用pH调节剂。仅在较高浓度下有AHA特性。

skin_types.notes_en: At standard concentrations, purely a pH adjuster. Not an exfoliant.
skin_types.notes_zh: 在标准浓度下纯粹是pH调节剂。不是去角质剂。

ingredients.notes_en: Almost always used as a pH adjuster, not an active. Don't confuse with a treatment-level AHA.
ingredients.notes_zh: 几乎总是用作pH调节剂而非活性成分。不要与治疗级AHA混淆。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Safe at trace amounts used for pH adjustment. Not an irritant at final product levels.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 用于pH调节的微量是安全的。在最终产品中的含量不会造成刺激。

skin_types.notes_en: Sounds scary but at product concentrations is completely safe—just a pH adjuster.
skin_types.notes_zh: 听起来可怕但在产品浓度下完全安全——只是pH调节剂。

ingredients.notes_en: Don't be alarmed by this on an ingredient list. It reacts and is consumed during formulation—not present as lye in the final product.
ingredients.notes_zh: 不要因为在成分表上看到它而惊慌。它在配方过程中会反应消耗——最终产品中不以烧碱形式存在。

zh: 表面活性剂（与脂肪酸结合时）

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR safe at concentrations up to 5%. Should not be used in products with nitrosating agents.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估5%以下浓度安全。不应与亚硝化剂一起使用。

skin_types.notes_en: Safe at cosmetic concentrations.
skin_types.notes_zh: 化妆品浓度下安全。

ingredients.notes_en: Common pH adjuster and emulsifier. Some controversy but CIR confirms safety at standard levels.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常见pH调节剂和乳化剂。有些争议但CIR确认标准水平下安全。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR safe. Binds metal ions that could destabilize products.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估安全。结合可能导致产品不稳定的金属离子。

skin_types.notes_en: Non-active. Purely functional.
skin_types.notes_zh: 非活性成分。纯粹功能性。

ingredients.notes_en: Helps preservatives work better by binding metal ions from water. Very common but unexciting ingredient.
ingredients.notes_zh: 通过结合水中的金属离子帮助防腐剂更好地工作。非常常见但不起眼的成分。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR safe for cosmetic use. EU restricted in wash-off products >0.1% for environmental reasons.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估化妆品使用安全。欧盟因环境原因限制在冲洗产品中>0.1%。

skin_types.notes_en: Evaporates quickly, leaving silky feel.
skin_types.notes_zh: 快速蒸发，留下丝滑感。

ingredients.notes_en: Volatile silicone—evaporates after application. Gives that 'silky' primer feel. Environmental concerns in EU.
ingredients.notes_zh: 挥发性硅油——涂抹后蒸发。带来妆前乳的'丝滑'感。在欧盟有环保方面的担忧。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: CIR safe. Known to be moderately comedogenic.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: CIR评估安全。已知有中度致粉刺性。

skin_types.notes_en: Moderately comedogenic. Avoid if acne-prone.
skin_types.notes_zh: 中度致粉刺。痤疮易发者应避免。

ingredients.notes_en: Common emollient but comedogenic rating of 3. Acne-prone skin should be cautious.
ingredients.notes_zh: 常见润肤剂但致粉刺指数为3。痤疮易发皮肤应谨慎。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Active triterpenoid from Centella Asiatica. Stimulates type I collagen synthesis.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 积雪草中的活性三萜苷。刺激I型胶原蛋白合成。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Key component of Centella Asiatica alongside madecassoside. Popular in K-beauty 'cica' products.
ingredients.notes_zh: 积雪草的关键成分，与羟基积雪草苷并列。在韩国护肤'积雪草'产品中很受欢迎。

effective_concentration.notes_en: OTC concentrations up to 10%. Higher may require prescription.
effective_concentration.notes_zh: OTC浓度最高10%。更高可能需要处方。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: One of the oldest acne treatments. FDA-approved OTC acne ingredient.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 最古老的痤疮治疗之一。FDA批准的OTC痤疮成分。

skin_types.notes_en: Can be drying. Distinctive smell.
skin_types.notes_zh: 可能导致干燥。有独特气味。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Considered safe during pregnancy. Good acne treatment option for pregnant women.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 孕期被认为安全。对孕妇来说是好的痤疮治疗选择。
ingredients.notes_en: Old-school acne treatment that still works. Good pregnancy-safe option. Smells like eggs.
ingredients.notes_zh: 经典痤疮治疗仍然有效。好的孕期安全选择。闻起来像鸡蛋。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: FDA-recognized skin protectant. Effective for eczema and sensitive skin.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: FDA认定的皮肤保护剂。对湿疹和敏感肌有效。

skin_types.notes_en: Extremely soothing. Avoid if oat-allergic.
skin_types.notes_zh: 极其舒缓。燕麦过敏者应避免。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Safe. Excellent for pregnancy skin changes.
ingredients.pregnancy_notes_zh: 安全。非常适合孕期皮肤变化。
ingredients.notes_en: Aveeno's key ingredient. FDA skin protectant. One of the best options for eczema.
ingredients.notes_zh: Aveeno的核心成分。FDA皮肤保护剂。湿疹最佳选择之一。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Rich in linoleic and alpha-linolenic acid. Some evidence for eczema support.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 富含亚油酸和α-亚麻酸。部分证据支持用于湿疹。

skin_types.notes_en: Low comedogenic rating despite being an oil.
skin_types.notes_zh: 尽管是油但致粉刺指数低。

ingredients.pregnancy_notes_en: Topical use safe. Contains no THC or CBD.
ingredients.notes_en: Contains NO THC or CBD. High in linoleic acid, which acne-prone skin tends to be deficient in.
ingredients.notes_zh: 不含THC或CBD。富含亚油酸——痤疮易发皮肤往往缺乏这种脂肪酸。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Zinc compound with oil-regulating properties. Often paired with niacinamide.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 具有调节油脂特性的锌化合物。常与烟酰胺搭配。

skin_types.notes_en: Good for oil control.
skin_types.notes_zh: 控油效果好。

ingredients.notes_en: The zinc in The Ordinary's Niacinamide + Zinc serum. Helps with oil control and acne.
ingredients.notes_zh: The Ordinary烟酰胺+锌精华中的锌成分。帮助控油和抗痤疮。

zh: 比标准玻尿酸渗透更深

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Lower molecular weight allows deeper skin penetration. Studies show improved hydration vs high MW alone.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 较低分子量允许更深的皮肤渗透。研究显示与高分子量相比改善保湿效果。

skin_types.notes_en: Best used in multi-weight HA products.
skin_types.notes_zh: 最好在多分子量HA产品中使用。

ingredients.notes_en: Penetrates deeper than standard HA. Best products use multi-weight HA (low + medium + high).
ingredients.notes_zh: 比标准HA渗透更深。最佳产品使用多分子量HA（低+中+高）。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Studies show superior water retention compared to HA. Inhibits hyaluronidase.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 研究显示保水能力优于HA。抑制透明质酸酶。

skin_types.notes_en: Excellent humectant. Can be layered with HA.
skin_types.notes_zh: 优秀的保湿剂。可以与HA叠加使用。

ingredients.notes_en: The 'next generation' humectant. Actually inhibits the enzyme that breaks down HA in skin.
ingredients.notes_zh: '下一代'保湿剂。实际上能抑制分解皮肤中HA的酶。

ingredients.evidence_notes_en: Extremophile-derived ingredient. Studies show UV protection enhancement and anti-inflammatory effects.
ingredients.evidence_notes_zh: 来源于极端微生物的成分。研究显示增强紫外线防护和消炎效果。

skin_types.notes_en: Very well-tolerated.
skin_types.notes_zh: 耐受性非常好。

ingredients.notes_en: Produced by bacteria that survive extreme conditions. Emerging ingredient for anti-pollution skincare.
ingredients.notes_zh: 由在极端条件下生存的细菌产生。抗污染护肤的新兴成分。
